testcase.name: test_sentence_mode_failure_placeholder_includes_original

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected block-level placeholder, got: '[Translation failed|zh-TW]' assert '[Translation failed|zh-TW]' == '[Translation...] Hello world'
- [Translation failed|zh-TW] Hello world ? ------------ + [Translation failed|zh-TW]

testcase.failure: tests/test_sentence_mode_consistency.py:65: in test_sentence_mode_failure_placeholder_includes_original assert tmap[(tgt, src_text)] == expected_placeholder, ( E AssertionError: Expected block-level placeholder, got: '[Translation failed|zh-TW]' E assert '[Translation failed|zh-TW]' == '[Translation...] Hello world' E E - [Translation failed|zh-TW] Hello world E ? ------------ E + [Translation failed|zh-TW]
